title: Nova Analytics
summary: A real-time analytics dashboard with custom data pipelines and visualizations.
description: Nova Analytics is a SaaS dashboard that ingests millions of events per day and renders real-time charts. Built with a focus on performance and a Stripe-inspired UI.

caseStudy.challenges: Handling high-throughput event ingestion while keeping the dashboard responsive in real time.
caseStudy.solutions: Implemented a Redis-backed queue with batched writes and websocket-driven incremental UI updates.
caseStudy.results: Reduced dashboard load time by 60% and supports 5x more concurrent users.

title: Aurora UI Kit
summary: An open-source component library with glassmorphism and neon aesthetics.
description: A React + Tailwind component library inspired by Linear and Vercel, focused on accessibility and motion design.

caseStudy.challenges: Designing flexible, themeable components without sacrificing visual identity.
caseStudy.solutions: Used CSS variables for theming tokens and composable primitives with Radix-style patterns.
caseStudy.results: Adopted in 3 internal products, cutting UI dev time by 40%.

title: Pulse CRM
summary: A lightweight CRM for small teams with automation workflows.
description: Pulse CRM helps small sales teams manage leads, automate follow-ups, and track pipelines with a minimal, fast UI.

caseStudy.challenges: Keeping the product simple while supporting custom automation rules.
caseStudy.solutions: Built a visual rule-builder backed by a small JSON-based DSL evaluated client-side.
caseStudy.results: Onboarded 200+ teams within the first 3 months.
